name: agent-ready
description: Make any repository ready for AI coding agents in 60 seconds.

scripts.check: node --check bin/agent-ready.mjs && node --check src/cli.mjs && node --check src/config.mjs && node --check src/scanner.mjs && node --check src/generator.mjs && node --check src/linter.mjs && node --check src/reporter.mjs
